task_completion.description: Open the correct manuscript file in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) open with 'yellow_wallpaper_manuscript.odt' visible in the title bar.

task_completion.description: Set page size to A5 and margins to 0.75 inches.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Page Style dialog box showing Format: A5 (or Width 5.83 in / 14.8 cm, Height 8.27 in / 21.0 cm) and Margins set to 0.75 in (1.9 cm) for Left, Right, Top, and Bottom. Alternatively, check the on-screen ruler reflecting these dimensions.

task_completion.description: Format body text to 11pt Liberation/DejaVu Serif, justified, with a 0.25-inch first-line indent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the body text being selected or the cursor placed within it, with the toolbar showing Font: 'Liberation Serif' or 'DejaVu Serif', Size: 11, Alignment: Justified. Look for the Paragraph dialog or ruler showing a First Line Indent of 0.25 in (0.64 cm).

task_completion.description: Format the title and author lines, followed by a page break.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'THE YELLOW WALLPAPER' with Centered alignment, Bold, and font size 18pt or larger. 'By Charlotte Perkins Gilman' should be centered below it. Look for a visible page break indicator (e.g., a blue dashed line) or the next paragraph starting at the top of a new page.

task_completion.description: Format the five section headings (I, II, III, IV, V) to be centered, bold, and start on new pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Roman numeral section headings ('I.', 'II.', etc.) appearing at the very top of a new page, with Centered alignment and Bold formatting applied.
Look for the agent clicking the 'Save' icon, using File > Save, or the absence of an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk) in the window title bar after all formatting is complete.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical word processor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent interacted with a GUI application like LibreOffice Writer, rather than using terminal commands, Python scripts, or a plain text editor to modify the ODT XML directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used proper formatting tools instead of manual spacing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent used alignment buttons, indent settings, and page break inserts (Ctrl+Enter or Insert > Page Break) rather than typing multiple spaces/tabs to fake centering/indents, or pressing Enter repeatedly to fake page breaks.

integrity.description: Verify the agent edited the actual manuscript.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the document contains the actual story text of 'The Yellow Wallpaper', rather than the agent creating a new blank document and only typing the title and chapter headings.

First-line indent must be exactly 0.25 in. The title is exactly 'THE YELLOW WALLPAPER' and the author line is 'By Charlotte Perkins Gilman'. The chapters are marked with Roman numerals 'I.', 'II.', 'III.', 'IV.', 'V.'.
